title: State transition path 1 (ALL_TRANSITIONS)
expected_result: Password check is bypassed via SQL injection, and the system grants access (LoggedIn state) without correct password.
coverage_items: NotLoggedIn--login_submit[email contains SQL injection payload]/bypass password validation-->LoggedIn

title: EP: SQL injection email with incorrect password bypasses authentication
precondition: At least one user account exists in database (e.g., 'user@example.com' with password 'correctPassword1')
test_steps:
Navigate to login page
Enter email "' OR 1=1 --"
Enter password 'anyPassword'
Click login button
expected_result: Login succeeds without requiring correct password; user is authenticated as some user (e.g., first in database)

title: DT: SQL injection bypass rule (email_contains_sqli = true)
precondition: At least one user account exists in database
test_steps:
Navigate to login page
Enter email "' OR 1=1 --"
Enter password 'irrelevantPassword'
Click login button
expected_result: Password check bypassed; login succeeds with any password
